parameters.query: SELECT access_token FROM gmail_tokens WHERE user_id = $1 AND expires_at > datetime('now')

INSERT INTO writing_style (user_id, formality_score, common_greetings, common_signoffs, avg_sentence_length, tone, writing_patterns, analyzed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, datetime('now')) ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET formality_score=excluded.formality_score, common_greetings=excluded.common_greetings, common_signoffs=excluded.common_signoffs, avg_sentence_length=excluded.avg_sentence_length, tone=excluded.tone, writing_patterns=excluded.writing_patterns, analyzed_at=excluded.analyzed_at
